visual: Rises from the previous posture into a bow stance with one hand raised above the head like a fan and the other pushing forward at shoulder height.
motion_description: The motion begins from a low crouch with the weight predominantly on the back right leg and the left foot resting lightly on its ball. Moving in a slow, continuous flow, the body rises upright while the right arm sweeps up and back to form an arc over the head. Concurrently, the left foot steps forward and the weight shifts to transition into a front-weighted bow stance. As the stance settles, the torso turns slightly to face forward and the left hand pushes steadily outward to finish at shoulder height.
